templates.name: Open Movie Search
templates.description: A floating search widget that lets you search movies, series, and episodes via the OMDb API. Shows poster, ratings (IMDB, Rotten Tomatoes, Metacritic), plot, cast, and details. Supports search by title with type and year filters, and paginated results.
templates.author: Browser Automata

scripts.name: Open Movie Search
scripts.description: Injects a floating search widget (toggled via a corner button) that queries the OMDb API. Supports search-by-title with type/year filters, paginated results grid, and a detail view with poster, ratings, plot, and cast.
